tasks.stop_rule: Stop after naming up to 3 next edit areas, up to 3 blockers, and one verify path.
tasks.goal: Orient in the repository and identify the next safe implementation area.
acceptance_criteria: 핵심 변경 후보 파일 또는 모듈을 1~3개로 좁힌다
작업 전 blocker 또는 readiness 리스크를 명시한다
다음 액션과 verify 경로를 한 줄로 정리한다
execution_quality_checks: 불필요한 primitive tool chain으로 새지 않는다
근거 없는 broad edit 제안을 하지 않는다

mode_prompts.baseline: Use native repo exploration only. Read the repo, identify the best next edit area, and explain the reasoning with the smallest possible search/read loop.
mode_prompts.naive-on: Use CodeLens if helpful, but do not follow any special routing rules. Find the best next edit area and explain the reasoning.
mode_prompts.routed-on: Use deferred loading and workflow-first routing. Start with analyze_change_request or verify_change_readiness, expand evidence only if needed, and identify the best next edit area.

tasks.stop_rule: Stop after the first sufficient workflow report. Return at most 3 risky files, 3 reviewer checks, and 3 evidence handles.
tasks.goal: Review change impact and explain what can break, what must be checked, and where the strongest evidence lives.
acceptance_criteria: 영향 파일 또는 모듈을 우선순위와 함께 제시한다
verify 또는 reviewer 관점의 check 목록을 제시한다
execution_quality_checks: impact claim에 evidence handle 또는 동등 근거를 연결한다
reviewer 관점에서 설명 가능한 결과를 만든다

mode_prompts.baseline: Review the likely impact of the target change using native search/read only. Identify risky files, likely breakpoints, and what should be verified.
mode_prompts.naive-on: Review the likely impact of the target change. Use CodeLens if helpful, but without special routing constraints.
mode_prompts.routed-on: Use deferred loading and workflow-first routing. Start with impact_report or verify_change_readiness, then expand evidence only if the first report is insufficient.

tasks.stop_rule: Stop after one readiness verdict, up to 3 blockers or checks, and at most 2 next actions.
tasks.goal: Decide whether a rename or refactor is ready to execute and what must be verified first.
acceptance_criteria: 참조/rename safety와 verify 필요 지점을 명시한다
mutation 전 선행해야 할 check를 남긴다
execution_quality_checks: mutation readiness를 추정이 아닌 verifier 결과로 설명한다
blocked 또는 caution 이유를 actionable하게 적는다

mode_prompts.baseline: Assess rename or refactor safety using native search, references, and tests only. State whether the change is ready, caution, or blocked.
mode_prompts.naive-on: Assess rename or refactor safety. Use CodeLens if helpful, but do not force deferred loading or verifier-first routing.
mode_prompts.routed-on: Use verifier-first routing. Start with safe_rename_report, unresolved_reference_check, or refactor_safety_report before any mutation suggestion.

tasks.stop_rule: Stop after the first local answer; do not expand into multi-file reasoning unless the task boundary breaks.
tasks.goal: Complete a small local code understanding or single-file edit task with minimal overhead.
acceptance_criteria: 대상 파일 또는 심볼을 빠르게 찾는다
execution_quality_checks: point lookup 성격이면 native path를 유지한다
CodeLens를 쓰더라도 bootstrap 비용을 정당화할 만큼 이득이 있어야 한다

mode_prompts.baseline: Solve the local lookup or single-file task with the smallest possible native loop.
mode_prompts.naive-on: Solve the local lookup or single-file task. CodeLens is available but not required.
mode_prompts.routed-on: Use routed CodeLens only if the task unexpectedly turns into a multi-file or reviewer-heavy problem. Otherwise stay native.

notes: Use current deferred loading and verifier/runtime behavior as the evaluation subject
Prefer impact/reviewer tasks that cross app shell, frontend, and scripts
Next.js repo with existing AGENTS guidance
Onboarding may remain cheaper with native repo reading on narrow tasks
